name: Kakapo
conservationEfforts: All kakapo have been moved to predator-free islands. Every bird is individually named and tracked. Supplementary feeding boosts breeding success. Genome sequencing informs genetic management.
description: The world's only flightless, nocturnal parrot and the heaviest parrot species. Males produce a deep booming call audible 5 km away. Each bird has a distinct personality known to researchers.
